word: H2229 - זָרַם - zâram - zaw-ram' - Carry away as with a flood

sections.paragraph: Short Definition: Carry away as with a flood

Original: זרם

Transliteration: zâram

Phonetic: zaw-ram'

BDB Definition:

  1. to pour out, pour forth in floods, flood away
    1. (Qal) to pour out, flood away
    2. (Poal) to pour forth, pour out
      1. of God's power (figuratively)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 581

Part(s) of speech: Verb
